title: Gmail node sending attachments without file extension
symptom: Attachments sent via the Gmail node appear as 'untitled' with no file extension in the recipient's mailbox.
applies_when: Attachment is generated from a previous node
not_this_if: Attachment is correctly named in the n8n workflow
root_cause: The file name is not being properly set in the workflow. The Gmail node relies on the actual file name, and if the file name does not include an extension, it will be sent without one.
fix_steps: Open the Download File node settings.
Change the File Name field from '{{ $('Copy file').item.json.name }}' to '{{ $('Copy file').item.json.name }}.pdf'.
Save the workflow and test sending the email again.
agent_instruction: Ensure the file name includes the '.pdf' extension in the Download File node settings.
